name: newrelic-remote-mcp
title: New Relic
summary: New Relic MCP server allows your AI agents within supported development tools to have one consistent way to connect to and retrieve rich context and powerful tools from New Relic's observability platform.
description: New Relic MCP server allows your AI agents within supported development tools to have one consistent way to connect to and retrieve rich context and powerful tools from New Relic's observability platform.

useCases.name: Natural language queries
useCases.description: Convert a natural language request into an NRQL query, execute it, and return results.

useCases.name: Deployment Impact Analysis
useCases.description: Analyze the performance impact of a deployment on a specific entity

useCases.name: Alert Insights Analysis
useCases.description: Generate an alert intelligence analysis report for a specific issue.

useCases.name: End-user Impact Analysis
useCases.description: Generate an end-user impact analysis report for a specific issue.

useCases.name: Application Log Analysis
useCases.description: Analyze application logs to identify error patterns, anomalous behavior, and recurring issues.

useCases.name: Golden Metrics Analysis
useCases.description: Analyze golden metrics (key health indicators: throughput, response time, error rate, and saturation).

useCases.name: Transactions Analysis
useCases.description: Analyze transactions for a specific entity within a time window, identifying slow and error-prone transactions.

useCases.name: Get/List/Search for something
useCases.description: Get a specific entity or dashboard, list a variety of data (accounts, alerts, dashboards, entities, events, logs, etc.) or search for entities or incidents based on a key word.

newrelic-api-key.description: Authenticate with New Relic using a User API Key.
